nodes.name: AllowAutoAcceptPairingAndPrivacyConsentPrompts
nodes.description: Allows or disallows the automatic acceptance of the pairing and privacy user consent dialog when launching apps. NoteThere were issues reported with the previous release of this policy and a fix was  Most restricted value is 0.

nodes.name: AllowCrossDeviceClipboard
nodes.description: Allows syncing of Clipboard across devices under the same Microsoft account.

nodes.name: AllowInputPersonalization
nodes.description: Updated in Windows 10, version 1809. This policy specifies whether users on the device have the option to enable online speech recognition. When enabled, users can use their voice for dictation and to talk to Cortana and other apps that use Microsoft cloud-based speech recognition. Microsoft will use voice input to help improve our speech services. If the policy value is set to 0, online speech recognition will be disabled and users cannot enable online speech recognition via settings. If policy value is set to 1 or is not configured, control is deferred to users. Most restricted value is 0.

nodes.name: DisableAdvertisingId
nodes.description: Enables or disables the Advertising ID. Most restricted value is 0.

nodes.name: DisablePrivacyExperience
nodes.description: Enabling this policy prevents the privacy experience from launching during user logon for new and upgraded users.

enum.description: Allow the 'choose privacy settings for your device' screen for a new user during their first logon or when an existing user logs in for the first time after an upgrade.
Do not allow the 'choose privacy settings for your device' screen when a new user logs in or an existing user logs in for the first time after an upgrade.

nodes.name: DisablePrivacyExperience
nodes.description: Enabling this policy prevents the privacy experience from launching during user logon for new and upgraded users.

enum.description: Allow the 'choose privacy settings for your device' screen for a new user during their first logon or when an existing user logs in for the first time after an upgrade.
Do not allow the 'choose privacy settings for your device' screen when a new user logs in or an existing user logs in for the first time after an upgrade.

nodes.name: EnableActivityFeed
nodes.description: Enables ActivityFeed, which is responsible for mirroring different activity types (as applicable) across device graph of the user.

enum.description: Disabled. Apps/OS can't publish the activities and roaming is disabled. (not published to the cloud).
Enabled. Apps/OS can publish the activities and will be roamed across device graph.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessAccountInfo
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can access account information.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessAccountInfo_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are allowed access to account information. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessAccountInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessAccountInfo_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are denied access to account information. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessAccountInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessAccountInfo_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. The user is able to control the account information privacy setting for the listed Windows apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessAccountInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can access the movement of the user's head, hands, motion controllers, and other tracked objects, while the apps are running in the background.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows Store Apps. Listed apps are allowed access to the user's movements while the apps are running in the background. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows Store Apps. Listed apps are denied access to the user's movements while the apps are running in the background. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows Store Apps. The user is able to control the user movements privacy setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessBackgroundSpatialPerception policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessCalendar_ForceDenyTheseApps

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessCalendar_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. The user is able to control the calendar privacy setting for the listed Windows apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessCalendar policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessCallHistory_UserInControlOfTheseApps

nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the screen capture border privacy setting for the listed apps. nodes.name: LetAppsAccessMessaging_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the messaging privacy setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessMessaging policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessRadios_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will have access to control radios. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessRadios policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessRadios_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will not have access to control radios. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessRadios policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessRadios_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the radios privacy setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessRadios policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessSystemAIModels_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps are allowed to use text and image generation features of Windows. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessSystemAIModels policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessSystemAIModels_ForceDenyTheseApps

nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the text and image generation setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessSystemAIModels policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps are allowed access to tasks. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessTasks policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can access trusted devices.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will have access to trusted devices. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will not have access to trusted devices. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the 'trusted devices' privacy setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsAccessTrustedDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsActivateWithVoice
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can be activated by voice.

enum.description: User in control. Users can decide if Windows apps can be activated by voice using Settings > Privacy options on the device.
Force allow. Windows apps can be activated by voice and users cannot change it.
Force deny. Windows apps cannot be activated by voice and users cannot change it.

nodes.name: LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can be activated by voice while the system is locked.

enum.description: User in control. Users can decide if Windows apps can be activated by voice while the screen is locked using Settings > Privacy options on the device.
Force allow. Windows apps can be activated by voice while the screen is locked, and users cannot change it.
Force deny. Windows apps cannot be activated by voice while the screen is locked, and users cannot change it.

nodes.name: LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can get diagnostic information about other apps, including user names.

nodes.name: LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are allowed to get diagnostic information about other apps, including user names. This setting overrides the default LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are not allowed to get diagnostic information about other apps, including user names. This setting overrides the default LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. The user is able to control the app diagnostics privacy setting for the listed Windows apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsGetDiagnosticInfo policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsRunInBackground
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can run in the background.

nodes.name: LetAppsRunInBackground_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are allowed to run in the background. This setting overrides the default LetAppsRunInBackground policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsRunInBackground_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. Listed Windows apps are not allowed to run in the background. This setting overrides the default LetAppsRunInBackground policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsRunInBackground_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Windows apps. The user is able to control the background apps privacy setting for the listed Windows apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsRunInBackground policy setting for the specified Windows apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsSyncWithDevices
nodes.description: This policy setting specifies whether Windows apps can communicate with unpaired wireless devices.

nodes.name: LetAppsSyncWithDevices_ForceAllowTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will be allowed to communicate with unpaired wireless devices. This setting overrides the default LetAppsSyncWithDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsSyncWithDevices_ForceDenyTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. Listed apps will not be allowed to communicate with unpaired wireless devices. This setting overrides the default LetAppsSyncWithDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: LetAppsSyncWithDevices_UserInControlOfTheseApps
nodes.description: List of semi-colon delimited Package Family Names of Microsoft Store Apps. The user is able to control the 'Communicate with unpaired wireless devices' privacy setting for the listed apps. This setting overrides the default LetAppsSyncWithDevices policy setting for the specified apps.

nodes.name: PublishUserActivities
nodes.description: Allows apps/system to publish 'User Activities' into ActivityFeed.

enum.description: Disabled. Apps/OS can't publish the user activities.
Enabled. Apps/OS can publish the user activities.

nodes.name: UploadUserActivities
nodes.description: Allows ActivityFeed to upload published 'User Activities'.
